summary: Tested v0.095 release features: Cinema Journal crash fix, auth improvements, disabled features (Infrastructure, Challenges, Trailer), automatic soundtrack scoring, cost breakdown, cast endpoints with random sampling. Backend 19/20 tests passed, Frontend all critical flows working.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint may not exist or be named differently

critical_code_review_comments: All P0-P3 features verified and working correctly
Cinema Journal (lines 4361-4384 server.py): Fixed None director/screenwriter handling with fallback placeholder objects
Infrastructure button: Has opacity-40 and cursor-not-allowed (App.js lines 315-317)
Challenges button: Has opacity-40 and cursor-not-allowed (App.js lines 351-353)
Trailer section: Shows 'In pausa' badge for owners (FilmDetail.jsx lines 903-908)
Soundtrack step 9: Auto-calculates score from composer skills (FilmWizard.jsx lines 1021-1063)
Cost breakdown step 12: Shows Equipment, Cast Fees, Location costs (FilmWizard.jsx lines 1082-1093)
Cast endpoints: Using $sample for random 50 results (server.py line 1420)
Release notes: v0.095 is current_version with changelog
context_for_next_testing_agent: v0.095 features fully tested. Infrastructure and Challenges buttons are in navbar with disabled styling. Trailer generation paused with 'In pausa' badge on FilmDetail. FilmWizard has 12 steps - step 9 shows automatic soundtrack score, step 12 shows detailed cost breakdown. Cast endpoints return random 50 results using MongoDB $sample.

P0_fixes.login_auth: PASS - Login with test credentials works smoothly

P2_gameplay.soundtrack_auto_scoring: PASS - Step 9 shows composer-based score calculation
P2_gameplay.cost_breakdown: PASS - Step 12 shows Equipment, Cast Fees, Location costs
P2_gameplay.cast_random_sampling: PASS - All cast endpoints return 50 random results
